reason: Agent messaging functionality works correctly - agent receives question, processes it, and returns correct mathematical answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents.
Clicked agent "QA-20260502-224146-qxtp" in sidebar — Agent view opened, status displayed as "idle", message input field is active.
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator confirmed as "idle" in the agent header.
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message successfully entered in the text input.
Clicked send button — Message was submitted, agent status changed to "working", new session created titled "Simple Math Question Session".
Waited for agent response with 3-minute timeout — Agent responded within 2 seconds with answer "4".
Verified response contains "4" — Agent response clearly displays "4" in the chat window, which is the correct answer to the mathematical question.
Took final screenshot — Screenshot saved showing user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4" with status "Worked for 2s".
